borrow-more-progress.borrow-description: Confirm the borrow in your wallet.

borrow.daily-interest-cost-tooltip: How much interest you accrue per day based on your borrowed amount and the effective rate. Gives you a real sense of the daily cost of holding this loan.
borrow.effective-interest-tooltip: The actual annual rate you pay after discounts. It's the base rate minus any rebates you qualify for.
borrow.has-position-description: This address already has an active borrow position. Switch wallet or manage your existing position.
borrow.has-position-title: You have a position already open
borrow.health-factor-tooltip: A score that represents how safe your position is. Above 1.0 means you're safe. If it drops to 1.0 or below, your collateral can be liquidated.
borrow.liquidation-price-tooltip: The price at which your collateral would trigger a liquidation. If hemiBTC drops to this price, your position can be liquidated.
borrow.ltv-tooltip: The ratio between your debt and your collateral value. If you deposited $10,000 and borrowed $6,000, your LTV is 60%.
borrow.no-positions-description: Deposit collateral to borrow {{symbol}} and put your assets to work.

progress.confirm-description: Review the details and confirm the borrow in your wallet.
progress.supply-collateral-description: Confirm the collateral deposit to secure your borrow position.
progress.title: Borrow in progress

supply-collateral-progress.supply-description: Confirm the collateral deposit to your borrow position.
supply-collateral-progress.title: Supply in progress

borrow.title: Supply BTC or ETH to borrow {{symbol}}

withdraw-collateral-progress.withdraw-description: Confirm the withdrawal in your wallet.

exit-tickets.delete-description: If you delete it, your funds will go back to being staked and will no longer be in the cooldown lock. The withdrawal process will be canceled, and you can create a new exit ticket at any time.
exit-tickets.delete-toast-description: Your funds are now staked again and no longer in cooldown.
exit-tickets.empty-step-1-description: Start the withdrawal process. Your funds will move into a cooldown before they can be withdrawn.
exit-tickets.empty-step-2-description: A {{count}}-day cooldown period begins. During this time, your funds are locked and no yield is earned.
exit-tickets.empty-step-3-description: Once the cooldown ends, your funds become available to unlock and withdraw.
exit-tickets.title: Exit tickets
exit-tickets.withdraw-all-toast-description: All ready exit tickets have been withdrawn to your wallet.
exit-tickets.withdraw-toast-description: Your funds have been successfully withdrawn to your wallet.

stake.deposit-step-approve-description: This allows the app to use this token for your deposit.
stake.deposit-step-confirm-description: Review the details and confirm the stake in your wallet.
stake.deposit-toast-description: Your funds are now staked and earning yield.
stake.instant-withdraw-step-description: Review the details and confirm the withdrawal in your wallet.
stake.instant-withdraw-toast-description: Your funds have been successfully withdrawn to your wallet.
stake.withdraw-step-1-description: Submit a withdrawal request to begin the exit process. Your funds remain staked at this stage.
stake.withdraw-step-2-description: A {{count}}-day cooldown period begins. During this time, your funds are locked and no yield is earned.
stake.withdraw-step-3-description: Once the cooldown ends, your funds become available to unlock and withdraw.

earn.title: Stake VUSD to earn variable yield.

form.approve-10x-tooltip: Approves up to 10× your swap amount, reducing future approval steps. You can revoke it anytime.
form.preview-error: Failed to calculate amount to receive
form.vault-info_one: {{vusd}} will enter a vault with a {{seconds}}-second cooldown. Once complete, you can redeem it for {{firstSymbol}}.
form.vault-info_other: {{vusd}} will enter a vault with a {{seconds}}-second cooldown. Once complete, you can redeem it for {{allButLast}} or {{lastSymbol}}.

progress.approve-description: This allows the app to use this token for your swap.
progress.confirm-description: Review the details and confirm the swap in your wallet.
progress.title: Swap in progress

redeem-vault.cancel-redeem-description: Canceling this redemption will return your {{symbol}} to your available balance and remove them from the vault. You can redeposit {{symbol}} at any time to redeem for stables.
redeem-vault.cancel-redeem-toast-description: Your {{symbol}} has been returned to your available balance.
redeem-vault.empty-step-1-description: Enter how much {{symbol}} you want to convert back to stablecoins.
redeem-vault.empty-step-2-description: Your {{symbol}} is deposited here and starts a {{seconds}}-second security cooldown.
redeem-vault.empty-step-3-description_one: When the cooldown ends, redeem to {{firstSymbol}}.
redeem-vault.empty-step-3-description_other: When the cooldown ends, choose {{allButLast}} or {{lastSymbol}} to redeem.
redeem-vault.swap-confirmed-description: Your {{symbol}} is now available in your wallet
redeem-vault.title: Vault

swap.title: Swap stablecoins for VUSD and back

toast.deposit-description: VUSD is now available in your wallet

tutorial.learn-button: Learn how to redeem {{symbol}} to stables
tutorial.step-1-paragraph-1: Enter the amount of {{symbol}} you want to swap back to stables and click “Send to Vault.”
tutorial.step-1-paragraph-2: Your {{symbol}} will be deposited into the vault, where it enters a short {{seconds}}-second security cooldown before it becomes redeemable.
tutorial.step-2-paragraph-1: Once the cooldown ends, your balance will appear as ready to redeem in the Vault table.
tutorial.step-2-paragraph-2_one: Click Redeem, and choose the amount you want to receive.
tutorial.step-2-paragraph-2_other: Click Redeem, choose the amount, and select the stablecoin ({{allButLast}}, or {{lastSymbol}}) you want to receive.
tutorial.title: How to redeem VUSD to stables

wallet.activity-empty-description-no-transactio: Check back after your first transaction.
